Name: LLM Chat Completion
Description: Sends messages to an LLM and returns the completion. Supports multi-turn conversation history with persistence across operation runs.

SettingsInputs.Name: Messages
SettingsInputs.Description: JSON array of messages [{role, content}] for direct control

SettingsInputs.Name: ConversationAddress
SettingsInputs.Description: State address for message history (e.g. Operation.ChatHistory or Global.ChatSession.MyBot)

SettingsInputs.Name: AppendToConversation
SettingsInputs.Description: Append this exchange to history (default true if ConversationAddress set)

SettingsInputs.Name: ConversationMaxMessages
SettingsInputs.Description: Sliding window: max non-system messages to keep

SettingsInputs.Name: ConversationMaxTokens
SettingsInputs.Description: Token budget for history (approximate, trims oldest)

SettingsInputs.Name: PersistConversation
SettingsInputs.Description: Copy conversation history to ConversationPersistAddress on completion

SettingsInputs.Name: InputAddress
SettingsInputs.Description: State address to read context data from (appended to UserPrompt)

SettingsInputs.Name: Destination
SettingsInputs.Description: State address to write the completion content to

SettingsInputs.Name: AffinityKey
SettingsInputs.Description: Route to a specific Beacon worker

StateOutputs.Name: BeaconID
StateOutputs.Description: ID of the Beacon that executed the work
